revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-3-540

Alternative term: Quantization noise

The distortion introduced in the process of quantization. The distorted signal can be considered as the original signal with quantization noise added.

Reference: I.E.C.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Quantization distortion}}
